content.en:
Battle Gate Base.

Ye Tian saw the seventeen geniuses who participated in the battle this time, these people were all overlimiters, and the weakest one of them all had the combat power of the top one overlimiter, which was very close to the strength of the double overlimiter.

Of course, everyone hides their aura and strength, and it is difficult to judge the strength of the other party without fighting.

Ye Tian could only preliminarily judge the strength of these people in the overlimiter, but there was no way to judge what level they were at.

"Hello, my name is Qi He, and I am known as the Holy Son of Shenhe!"

"Hello, my name is Chopping Yu, and I am entitled Ten Chopping Holy Son!"

......

One by one, the over-limiters, that is, the holy sons of the Battle Gate, greeted Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian saw a hint of provocation in their eyes.

"My name is Ye Tian, and I am the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Ye Tiandang didn't see their eyes, and introduced with a smile.

At this moment, the Holy Son of Shenhe spoke: "The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, the day after tomorrow is the Holy War, you only came today, this is a little inappropriate, and you came so late, I am afraid that you don't even have time to understand the opponent, could it be that the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws thinks that his strength is very strong, so he is not afraid of all opponents, so he despises this Holy War and deliberately comes so late?"

The provocation is coming!

"I don't agree with the words of the Holy Son of Kamigawa, shouldn't we improve our strength as soon as possible, besides, I'm at the critical point of breaking through, wasting some time in exchange for a breakthrough in strength, isn't there anything wrong with that?

Ye Tian retorted.

"You ......"

Kamigawa Son couldn't refute it.

If this is the case, he will definitely come a little later and break through his strength!

But how can there be such a coincidence, they have long been in the bottleneck and shackles for countless years, and they have not had the strength to break through for a long time, so naturally it will not be such a coincidence.

However, he couldn't admit Ye Tian's words, otherwise he would be slapping himself in the face.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, if it weren't for the fact that it was only two days, and all the major forces had come here, it would be inconvenient to learn at this time, for fear that my strength would be exposed, otherwise I would definitely have to teach you a good lesson!"

"Feel free to take on the challenge, I'm more interested if you want to raise the stakes!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Humph!"

Kamigawa Saint Son shook his face and left directly.

Of course, not all the Holy Sons provoked Ye Tian, and a few of them came over to have a relationship with Ye Tianlala, after all, if they grow up in the future, they will both be the domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, and maybe when they cooperate, there is naturally no need to deliberately offend.

Even if we don't like each other sometimes, we won't say it.

There are still relatively few people who deliberately provoke like Kamigawa Seiko.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to his temporary residence in this base, and the battle gate also equipped Ye Tian with an ordinary domain ancestor level servant, Tuba domain ancestor.

"Holy Son, I am your servant Tuba, if there is anything, please tell me to do it!"

Tuba said respectfully.

Looking at this temporary servant, Ye Tian didn't know what to ask him to do for a while.

So, Ye Tian asked for information: "Do you know how to deal with the Holy Son of the Battle Gate and the situation of other Holy Gate Holy Lands?"

"Tuba knows a lot. "

Tuba Yuzu said.

"Tell me, what are the powerful opponents?" Ye Tian asked.

Tuba Yu Ancestor said: "Our battle gate has eight double overlimits on the surface, and you are one of them. As for the specific strength of these eight double overlimiters, it is not very clear. The three more powerful double overrunners are the Star Feather Son, the Kamigawa Son, and the Dawn Son, among which the Star Feather Son should be the most powerful one. "

"On the surface, what do you mean, could it be that there are other overrunners in our battle gate?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"The subordinates don't know, it's just a guess, after all, until the moment of the holy war, no one knows who will play. For example, the actual number of our battle gate is thirty, and now there are only eighteen participants on the surface, and whether there are other participants in the battle, I am afraid that even the Invincible Domain Ancestors may not be clear. "

Tuba Domain Ancestral Road.

Ye Tian nodded, if the actual combat power of a Holy Gate was known so easily, then the Holy Gate would be too secretless.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said that this year's Battle Gate Saint Sons are not very strong, but maybe even the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor himself doesn't understand the situation, in case those Supreme Domain Ancestors themselves secretly cultivate peerless demons, it is normal for the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor not to know.

"What about the other forces?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Tuba Yuzu quickly made a list of some formidable opponents.

The White Willow Holy Son of the Firmament Holy Gate, the Emperor He Holy Son of the Holy Gate of All Things, the Golden Crown Holy Son of the Immortal Holy Gate, the Overlord Holy Son of the Heaven-Shattering Holy Gate, the Shadowless Holy Son of the Immortal Holy Gate, the Demon Yao Holy Maiden of the Holy Maiden Gate, the Ten Realms Holy Son of the Golden Bell Holy Gate, the Dark Blood Holy Son of the Dark Holy Gate, and the Ape Heavenly Holy Son of the Forbidden Holy Gate!

This time, the Forbidden Holy Gate, a holy gate composed of forbidden creatures, is also qualified to participate in the battle, after all, they are also one of the ten holy gates, and naturally they also want a place in that mysterious world, and they will definitely come to participate.

If the forbidden holy gate is excluded, I am afraid that the major holy gates will start a war with each other.

And the representative seed choice of the Battle Gate is the Star Feather Holy Son!

These ten holy sons can be called seeded players, but in fact, everyone knows that they are just seeded players on the surface, and it is unknown whether they can enter the top 20 in the end.

Obviously, Ye Tian was not taken seriously, after all, his growth was too slow, and his best record was to be in the top 100.

And the top 100 of the list is not a great list, far from being comparable to the list of jihad.

"Holy Son, in addition to the ten holy gates, seventy-two holy places, thousands of sects, and hundreds of thousands of giant cities also have quotas to participate in the battle, among which there are also some strong people in the holy land, after all, the descendants of some strong people in the holy land may also be very talented, and it is more than enough to cultivate a demonic genius with the resources of the holy land. In the past, there were also Holy Land geniuses who entered the top ten of the Holy War List. In one session, there was even a number one in the holy war list, but unfortunately that genius later fell!"

Tuba Yuzu explained.

"Then there are a lot of people participating in the war this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Well, even if only one genius is sent to those giant cities, this is hundreds of thousands, plus the players of the ten major holy gates, seventy-two holy lands, and thousands of sects, there are about nearly a million geniuses participating in the battle!"

Tuba Yuzu said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked for some more information, and he generally knew a lot about this holy war.
